name: fmb-ecosystem
description: Unified production build for the FMB personal website, Yoni, SENZ, and Cognita.

scripts.build: node --import ./scripts/fetch-shim.mjs scripts/build-ecosystem.mjs && node scripts/post-build-entity-copy.mjs && node scripts/post-build-network-redesign.mjs && node scripts/check-fmb-network.mjs
